title: Analytics — agregat instruktur per kelas
description: Instructor+ analytics for belajar-with-rahmanef.com (STATUS #17, deferred from #3 'agregat instructor+'): per-lesson completion counts, course-completion (badge) count, tenant member count, and quiz attempt/pass stats per module. READ-ONLY aggregates over shared tables — no new tables, no mutations, every number derived on read with documented bounded takes (no bare .collect(), P1). Outputs carry no user identifiers (no PII). No routes: alpha mounts CourseAnalyticsView inside the kelola window-app; useCourseSummaries feeds the kelola course list.

kelola window-app (alpha #17): CourseAnalyticsView ← courseId dari kelola course editor
useCourseSummaries(tenantId) ← angka {completionCount, memberCount} di daftar kelas kelola
